2606.30562.title: Morphing into Hybrid Attention Models
2606.30562.paper_summary: Hybrid attention models improve long-context efficiency by retaining only a subset of full-attention layers and replacing the remaining layers with linear attention. However, the effectiveness of Transformer-to-hybrid conversion critically depends on which layers preserve full attention. Existing hybrid layer selection methods typically rely on heuristic strategies such as fixed placement patterns or layerwise scoring, implicitly treating layer importance as isolated and overlooking the interdependent layer effect under a global hybrid configuration. In this work, we formulate hybrid layer selection as a budget-constrained subset optimization problem. We further propose FlashMorph (Fast LAyer Selection for Hybrid MORPHing), an effective, efficient and scalable layer selection method for Transformer-to-hybrid conversion. FlashMorph first constructs a morphable model by equipping each full-attention layer with a converted linear-attention branch. It then freezes all model weights and jointly optimizes layerwise gates on synthetic long-context retrieval data, with a linearization regularization that encourages the model to rely on linear attention for efficiency. The learned gates are discretized under a preset full-attention budget to instantiate the hybrid architecture, followed by standard logits distillation and long-context finetuning. Extensive experiments show that FlashMorph discovers more effective hybrid configurations, preserves strong long-context recall and general benchmark performance while substantially reducing layer selection cost compared with existing layer selection methods, demonstrating its effectiveness, efficiency, and scalability.
2606.30562.paper_summary_zh: 混合注意力模型透過僅保留部分全注意力層並用線性注意力替換其餘層來提高長上下文的效率。然後，Transformer到混合的轉換效果在於哪些層保留全注意力。現有的混合層選擇方法通常依賴於啟發式策略，例如固定的放置模式或逐層評分，隱含地將層的重要性視為孤立的，並忽略在全局混合配置下層之間的相互依賴效應。在這項工作中，我們將混合層選擇公式化為一個預算約束的子集優化問題。我們進一步提出FlashMorph（快速層選擇以進行混合變形），這是一種有效、高效且可擴展的層選擇方法，用於Transformer到混合的轉換。FlashMorph首先通過為每個全注意力層配備一個轉換的線性注意力分支來構建一個可變形的模型。然後，它凍結所有模型權重，並在合成的長上下文檢索數據上聯合優化逐層門，並使用線性化正則化來鼓勵模型依賴線性注意力以提高效率。學習到的門在預設的全注意力預算下進行離散化，以實現混合架構，然後進行標準的邏輯蒸餾和長上下文微調。廣泛的實驗表明，FlashMorph發現了更有效的混合配置，保持了強大的長上下文召回和一般基準性能，同時與現有的層選擇方法相比，顯著降低了層選擇成本，證明了其有效性、高效性和可擴展性。
2606.30562.author: Disen Lan et.al.
2606.30562.authors: Disen Lan, Jianbin Zheng, Yuxi Ren, Xin Xia, Xuanda Wang, Xuefeng Xiao, Xipeng Qiu, Yu Cheng
